subcodes.first_line: Give thanks unto God, for thy name hath been mentioned before the Throne, and there hath descended upon thee from the heaven of thy Lord's bounty that which nothing can equal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشکر الله بما حضر اسمک لدی العرش و نزل لک من سماء عطاء ربک ما لایعادله شیء
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
